en: What would be a good time for you, Mark?
There's just some things that I still wanna do.
ko: 아직 하고 싶은 일이 몇 가지 있어.

en: Like what? Be a rock star? Don't mock me.
I'm just saying that this is...
This is something that's never gonna happen. You know...
Your shirt is stupid. Mark, grow up.
If I have to wait for you to become Kurt Cobain, I'm never gonna be a mother.
ko: 네가 커트 코베인이 되기를 기다려야 한다면,

en: I never said I'd be a good father.
ko: 내가 좋은 아빠가 될 거라고 말한 적 없어.
